headline: Woman's 'Toxic Trait' Is 'Caring Too Much' — She Actually Just Doesn't Respect Boundaries
summary: She shows up unannounced, gives unsolicited advice, and calls it 'love.' Her friends call it 'a lot.'
fullBody: Amanda Boundaryless lists her 'toxic trait' as 'caring too much.' Translation: she shows up at your house uninvited, reorganizes your fridge, and gives opinions you didn't ask for. 'I'm just passionate,' Amanda said. Her friends have started a group chat without her. 'We need space,' one said. Amanda is now 'giving them space' — which means 'checking in every hour to see if they need space.'
